key_items: Strive acquires 1,109 Bitcoin lifting holdings to 16,500 BTC - major institutional accumulation
Bitcoin analysis eyes sharp rebound after BTC collapses below M2 supply fair value - technical setup for bounce
$1.3B IBIT dark pool trade absorbed with barely any price movement - strong absorption capacity signals institutional demand
reasoning: Multiple institutional players (Strive, Smarter Web, BitMine) are actively accumulating Bitcoin during weakness, signaling confidence in current valuations. Technical analysis suggests Bitcoin is massively undervalued relative to M2 supply metrics, creating asymmetric upside potential for swing traders over the next week.
risks: Continued institutional ETF liquidations (witnessed with IBIT dark pool sale) or broader macro weakness could trigger another capitulation leg downward if support breaks.
